scenes.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic photograph of an American diner kitchen matching image1 layout. Male chef (image2) in white double-breasted chef coat, black-and-white checkered pants, and white chef hat leans against the prep counter pressing a fist into his lower back, talking to brunette young woman (image3) in faded black t-shirt, black pants, and black bib apron with red Ruby's Diner script who stands nearby facing him. Fluorescent kitchen lighting.

Photorealistic cinematic photograph of an American diner kitchen matching image1 layout. Warm kitchen morning light.
